row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward motion along a straight road with slight lane adjustments.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Red boxes indicate static or slow-moving objects (parked cars, buildings) and one moving vehicle ahead. Blue lines suggest ego path planning.

semantic.scene_summary: A daytime urban street scene captured from a moving vehicle. The environment includes multi-story buildings, parked cars on the left, a crosswalk, and a clear road ahead under cloudy skies.
key_objects: Parked cars on the left side
semantic.visibility_notes: All elements are clearly visible with natural lighting and sharp details.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward progression of the camera. Objects move consistently with perspective changes. No sudden jumps or disappearances.
logical.object_continuity: Vehicles and pedestrians remain continuous across frames without abrupt changes.
logical.structure_continuity: Buildings, roads, and infrastructure maintain consistent geometry and alignment throughout the sequence.

decision.ego_behavior_description: The ego vehicle moves steadily forward along the lane, maintaining its position relative to road markings.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards detected. The scene appears calm with no urgent interactions requiring evasive action.

semantic.scene_summary: An AI-generated version of the same urban street scene. It retains general layout but exhibits distortions and artifacts in object rendering.
semantic.visibility_notes: Many elements are blurred, duplicated, or structurally inconsistent. Some objects appear partially formed or merged.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Some temporal flickering observed in object boundaries. Motion appears less smooth compared to Row 1, with occasional warping effects.
logical.object_continuity: Objects show instability—some vanish or reappear inconsistently. Pedestrians and vehicles lack coherent trajectories.
logical.structure_continuity: Building facades and road structures exhibit slight warping and misalignment over time, suggesting generative instability.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego motion seems intended to follow the same forward trajectory, but visual noise may obscure precise path tracking.
decision.risk_context: Reduced scene clarity could impair downstream decision-making. No explicit risky behavior is visible, but ambiguity increases uncertainty.

preserved_elements: Presence of buildings and parked cars
newly_introduced_elements: Artifacts such as ghosting and blurring
Structural warping in buildings and roads
artifacts_or_instabilities: Loss of fine detail in dynamic elements
